# Chor Ratchawat Muay Thai Gym

> Muay Thai training camp in Koh Samui, Thailand with two locations in Bo Phut and Plai Laem. Family-run gym rated 9.3/10 on MuayThaiMap with 131 Google reviews.

## About

Chor Ratchawat (ช.รัชวาทย์) is a family-run Muay Thai camp on Koh Samui island in the Gulf of Thailand. Founded and operated by Thai trainers with decades of professional fighting experience, we welcome all levels — from complete beginners to competitive fighters.

We operate two locations:
- **Bo Phut Camp**: An intimate, authentic street gym in the heart of Fisherman's Village, Bo Phut. Ideal for focused 1-on-1 training and small groups.
- **Plai Laem Camp**: Our larger, fully-equipped facility near Big Buddha. Features a full-size ring, heavy bags, speed bags, and conditioning area.

Our trainers hold professional Muay Thai records and have trained fighters across Thailand's major stadiums. Training is available 6 days a week (closed Sundays), from 8 AM to 8 PM, with morning and evening group sessions and private lessons available throughout the day.

We are rated 9.3 out of 10 on MuayThaiMap and maintain 131+ Google reviews with consistently high ratings.

## Programs

### Group Classes
Join our morning (8:00-10:00) or evening (16:00-18:00) group sessions. Classes cover pad work, bag work, clinch technique, conditioning, and sparring. All levels welcome. Maximum 8–10 students per session for personal attention.

### Private 1-on-1 Training
Book a dedicated session with one of our trainers. Fully customized to your level, goals, and interests — whether technique refinement, fight preparation, or fitness. Sessions last 60–90 minutes. Available throughout the day by appointment.

### Kids Muay Thai
Structured classes for children ages 6–14. Focus on discipline, coordination, basic Muay Thai technique, and fitness in a safe, encouraging environment. Available at both locations.

### Fighter Training
Intensive program for aspiring or active competitors. Includes advanced pad work, sparring, clinch work, strength and conditioning, fight strategy, and weight management. Our trainers can arrange sanctioned fights at local stadiums on Koh Samui.

## Services

### Accommodation
We partner with local guesthouses and hostels near both camps to offer affordable accommodation for training visitors. Options range from basic fan rooms to air-conditioned studios. Ask us for current availability and rates.

### DTV Visa Support
We provide official documentation and invitation letters for the Destination Thailand Visa (DTV), which allows stays of up to 180 days (initial 60 days + 60-day extension + additional 60-day extension). Our staff assists with the application process.

### 90-Day Visa Extensions
For long-term students on education or other visa types, we assist with 90-day reporting and extension paperwork at the Koh Samui immigration office.

### Transport
Free pickup from Nathon Pier or Koh Samui Airport for students booking weekly or monthly packages. We can also arrange motorbike and scooter rentals.

### Gear & Equipment
Basic training gear (gloves, shin guards, hand wraps) is available for use at both camps. We also sell quality Muay Thai gear on-site.

### Insurance
We recommend and can help arrange travel and sports insurance coverage suitable for Muay Thai training. Required for sparring sessions.

## Pricing

| Package | Price |
|---|---|
| Drop-in (single session) | 500 THB |
| 5-session pack | 2,000 THB |
| 10-session pack | 3,500 THB |
| 1 week unlimited | 2,500 THB |
| 2 weeks unlimited | 4,500 THB |
| 1 month unlimited | 5,500 THB |
| Private session (1 hour) | 1,000 THB |
| Private session (5-pack) | 4,000 THB |
| Kids (per session) | 400 THB |
| Kids (monthly) | 3,500 THB |

All prices in Thai Baht (THB). Discounts available for long-term stays. Payment accepted: cash, bank transfer, credit card.

## Locations

### Bo Phut Camp
- **Address**: Soi Sunday Tambon Bo Put, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84320, Thailand
- **Area**: Bo Phut / Fisherman's Village
- **Character**: Intimate street gym, authentic atmosphere
- **Hours**: Monday–Saturday, 8:00 AM – 8:00 PM (closed Sunday)

### Plai Laem Camp
- **Address**: 20, 33 หมู่ที่ 5 ปลายแหลม ซอย 13, Tambon Bo Put, Amphoe Ko Samui, Surat Thani 84320, Thailand
- **Area**: Plai Laem / near Big Buddha
- **Character**: Larger facility with full-size ring and complete equipment
- **Hours**: Monday–Saturday, 8:00 AM – 8:00 PM (closed Sunday)
